1.Name: Platform DB (RLS-aware sysadmin)
1.Comment: Connects as pgadmin_sysadmin (non-superuser). app.bypass_rls=true is set by default so sysadmin sees all tenant data. RLS is still evaluated — not bypassed. For tenant-scoped queries run: SELECT set_config('app.current_tenant_id', '<org-id>', true);
